headline: Leidos Entrust Deal Recasts Energy Infrastructure Role And Investor Focus
summary: Leidos Holdings has completed its acquisition of Entrust Solutions, adding more than 3,100 professionals to its energy infrastructure business. The deal significantly expands Leidos Holdings' footprint in the energy infrastructure sector and is aligned with its NorthStar 2030 growth plan. The transaction reshapes the scale and mix of the NYSE:LDOS portfolio, with direct implications for its role in critical infrastructure markets. For investors tracking NYSE:LDOS, the Entrust Solutions...
